notes: Raw corpora live under .cache/datasets and are intentionally not committed.
Downloaded sizes are compressed/on-disk sizes from the local cache.
Use this file as the tracked inventory for corpus experiments and rebuilds.

resources.title: OPUS Albanian-English Moses corpora
resources.license: Varies by OPUS corpus; check per-corpus OPUS metadata before redistribution.
resources.checksumScope: Per-corpus ZIP sha256 values in manifestPath.
resources.provenanceGranularity: OPUS corpus zip and line number; no original document URL in Moses files.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Do not redistribute raw OPUS zips from foljapp; keep local cache only.
resources.contents: Albanian-English aligned sentence pairs. Useful when a foljapp form can be shown with an English translation, but quality varies heavily by source.
cautions: Rare forms mostly appeared in mined corpora such as CCMatrix and NLLB.
Alignment quality is uneven; examples need ranking, dedupe, and source labels.
Not enough by itself for rare Albanian-only forms.

resources.title: OPUS all Albanian-paired Moses corpora
resources.license: Varies by OPUS corpus; check per-corpus OPUS metadata before redistribution.
resources.checksumScope: Presence and byte size are recorded in manifestPath; per-zip sha256 not computed for this large all-pairs cache.
resources.provenanceGranularity: OPUS corpus zip and line number; no original document URL in Moses files.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Do not redistribute raw OPUS zips from foljapp; keep local cache only.
resources.contents: All currently listed OPUS Moses zip files paired with Albanian from the OPUS API snapshot, including non-English language pairs beyond the existing en-sq cache.
cautions: Includes one duplicate API row that maps to an existing unique local zip path.
Many Albanian sides repeat across multiple source languages and OPUS corpora.
Alignment quality varies heavily; examples need ranking, dedupe, and source labels.

resources.title: Genre-enriched web corpus MaCoCu-Genre Albanian
resources.provenanceGranularity: Document URL/domain/title plus sentence number generated locally.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Raw corpus stays local; derived short examples need source labels.
resources.contents: Document-level Albanian web text with URL/domain/title and genre metadata. Good candidate for monolingual sentence examples with provenance.
cautions: Documents can be very large; sentence segmentation and dedupe are required.
JSON lines contain full documents, so direct grep output can be unwieldy.

resources.title: Albanian web corpus MaCoCu-sq 1.0
resources.provenanceGranularity: Document URL/domain/title plus paragraph id and sentence number generated locally.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Raw corpus stays local; derived short examples need source labels.
resources.contents: Albanian web paragraphs with document and paragraph quality metadata. Strong candidate for filtered example search because paragraph quality and language tags are explicit.
cautions: XML parsing is needed; do not use ad hoc string slicing for ingestion.
Some paragraphs are headings or non-Albanian despite being inside the Albanian corpus.

resources.title: CC100 Albanian
resources.license: Public research corpus; check upstream terms before redistribution.
resources.provenanceGranularity: Local line number only; no source URL in the raw file.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Do not redistribute raw CC100 text from foljapp; keep local cache only.
resources.contents: Large raw Albanian web text. It finds rare forms that OPUS misses, including natural-looking occurrences of admirative forms.
cautions: Very noisy raw web data; sampled lines included junk/adult/spam text.
No URL or document metadata in the local text file.
Needs aggressive filtering before any public UI use.

resources.title: mC4 Albanian
resources.license: ODC-BY; Common Crawl terms also apply.
resources.provenanceGranularity: Document URL/timestamp plus shard line and sentence number generated locally.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Do not redistribute raw mC4 shards from foljapp; keep local cache only.
resources.contents: Albanian mC4 JSON.GZ shards with web document text, timestamp, and URL. Useful for broad monolingual sentence recall with basic provenance.
cautions: Very large web documents need sentence segmentation, dedupe, and filtering before UI use.
No upstream quality score is present in each record.
License and redistribution terms must be checked upstream before publishing derived examples.

resources.title: Albanian Wiki clean LM
resources.provenanceGranularity: Parquet row metadata after schema inspection; no sentence text fields present.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw parquet local until license and schema are reviewed.
resources.contents: Tokenized Albanian Wikipedia language-model rows with input_ids, attention_mask, and labels only.
cautions: The downloaded shards do not contain raw text, so exact sentence search needs the original tokenizer or source text.
Included in source accounting, but it currently emits zero searchable examples.

resources.title: Albanian-English bundled dataset
resources.provenanceGranularity: Parquet row metadata after schema inspection.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw parquet local; review GPL implications before derived public use.
resources.contents: Public Albanian-English bundled data for translation/fill-mask tasks.
cautions: Wired into the Rust example index through generic parquet text-field extraction.
Task-format rows may not be natural standalone sentence examples.

resources.title: BigMind Albanian
resources.provenanceGranularity: Parquet row metadata after schema inspection.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw parquet local until license and generation provenance are reviewed.
resources.contents: Large public Albanian instruction-style dataset.
cautions: Likely synthetic or instruction-tuned content; do not treat as corpus evidence without review.
Wired into the Rust example index through generic parquet text-field extraction.

resources.title: Albanian WikiOrca
resources.provenanceGranularity: Parquet row metadata after schema inspection.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw parquet local until license and generation provenance are reviewed.
resources.contents: Public Albanian WikiOrca question/response data.
cautions: Question-answer rows are not direct corpus attestations.
Wired into the Rust example index through generic parquet text-field extraction.

resources.title: FineWeb2 Albanian varieties
resources.provenanceGranularity: Parquet row metadata after schema inspection.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw parquet local until extraction and license attribution are reviewed.
resources.contents: FineWeb2 Albanian-language variety shards for Tosk/standard and Gheg-style language codes.
cautions: Wired into the Rust example index through generic parquet text-field extraction.
Likely overlaps with other Common Crawl-derived corpora.

resources.title: HPLT v3 Albanian als_Latn
resources.license: Check HPLT v3 terms before redistribution.
resources.provenanceGranularity: Common Crawl URL, crawl id, shard, record id, and generated sentence number.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw shards local; derived examples need URL/source labels and HPLT/Common Crawl term review.
resources.contents: Large HPLT v3 Albanian web corpus shards with document text and source URL metadata.
cautions: Common Crawl-derived web data overlaps with MaCoCu, CC100, mC4, FineWeb2, CulturaX, and OSCAR.
Still requires filtering and dedupe before UI display.

resources.title: Leipzig Albanian corpora
resources.provenanceGranularity: Leipzig archive name plus sentence id.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw archives local; derived examples need Leipzig/source attribution review.
resources.contents: Albanian community, news, and Wikipedia sentence corpora in multiple Leipzig sample-size archives.
cautions: Sample-size archives overlap heavily.
No original document URL is present in the sentence files.

resources.title: Tatoeba full exports
resources.provenanceGranularity: Tatoeba sentence id and public sentence URL.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Short attributed examples may be used under Tatoeba license; keep raw exports local.
resources.contents: Full Tatoeba sentence, link, and tag exports. The Rust scanner currently indexes Albanian rows from sentences_detailed.
cautions: Small compared with web corpora.
Sentence quality and naturalness vary by contributor.

resources.title: Wikimedia Albanian latest article dumps
resources.license: CC-BY-SA/GFDL depending on project content; check Wikimedia project terms.
resources.provenanceGranularity: Article title/page metadata after XML extraction.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Keep raw dumps local; derived examples need Wikimedia attribution and license handling.
resources.contents: Latest Albanian article dumps for sqwiki, sqwiktionary, sqwikiquote, sqwikibooks, and sqwikinews.
cautions: Wired into the Rust example index with lightweight namespace-0 MediaWiki extraction.
Markup extraction is intentionally simple and should not be treated as publication-quality wiki rendering.

resources.title: SEEUniversity Albanian corpora for BERT
resources.provenanceGranularity: Local line number only; no source URL in the raw file.
resources.redistributionPolicy: Raw corpus stays local; derived examples need filtering because source provenance is weak.
resources.contents: Line-oriented Albanian corpus for language-model training. It includes both reference/grammar material and general text.
cautions: Many hits for rare forms are grammar/reference prose rather than natural sentences.
No URL or document metadata in the local text file.

resources.title: Universal Dependencies Albanian STAF
resources.provenanceGranularity: CoNLL-U sentence id/source metadata where present.
resources.contents: Small manually annotated Albanian dependency treebank with train/dev/test CoNLL-U files.
cautions: Too small for broad example coverage.
Better for morphology/syntax checks than for rare-form search.

resources.title: Universal Dependencies Albanian TSA
resources.provenanceGranularity: CoNLL-U sentence id/source metadata where present.
resources.contents: Small manually annotated Albanian dependency treebank with a test CoNLL-U file.
cautions: Too small for broad example coverage.
Better for morphology/syntax checks than for rare-form search.

resources.title: CulturaX Albanian
resources.access: Hugging Face auto-gated; requires accepting terms and an authenticated token.
resources.contents: Large multilingual cleaned web corpus with Albanian shards. Good candidate for broader monolingual coverage after access is granted.
cautions: Not downloaded locally yet.
License/access terms must be checked before indexing or redistribution.

resources.title: OSCAR Albanian
resources.access: Hugging Face manual-gated; anonymous API exposes no downloadable sibling files.
resources.contents: Large multilingual Common Crawl-derived corpus; Albanian is listed as a supported language.
cautions: Not downloaded locally yet.
Manual approval is required before we can inspect exact Albanian files or sizes.
